name: update_fee_status
description: Record the status (NotDue/Due/Invoiced/Paid) and amount of a referring partner's fee on a transaction. REFUSED unless the partner has a recorded, signed fee-sharing agreement — record the agreement first via update_partner. Records facts only: never computes, negotiates, or pays fees. REQUIRES prior user confirmation of the exact change.

transaction.description: The transaction the fee is on — name or exact id (partner fees live on transactions)

reason.description: One line explaining the change — written to the CRM audit trail

confirmed.description: Only pass true after the user has explicitly confirmed this exact fee change in this conversation. If you have not asked yet, ask first — do not call this tool.
